title: Software Update - DFU - Can be completed for standalone headsets
scenario: Software Update (DFU) completes successfully for standalone headset via Device Settings > Software
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure the headset is paired and connected to the app via Bluetooth.
3. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
4. In Device Settings, scroll to and tap on 'Software' (or 'Software Update').
5. Tap the 'Update' button (or 'Check for Update') to initiate the DFU process.
6. Wait for the firmware download and installation to complete. Do not disconnect the headset or close the app during the process.
7. Once the update finishes, verify the headset firmware version is updated in the Software section.
expected: The headset firmware is successfully updated to the latest version. The Software section in Device Settings displays the new firmware version, and the headset remains connected and functional.
